nodes.name: Flammulated flycatcher
nodes.summary: Flammulated flycatcher（Flammulated flycatcher，学名 Ramphotrigon flammulatum），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于錫那羅亞州、恰帕斯州。

nodes.name: 錫那羅亞州
nodes.summary: 錫那羅亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、Lesser roadrunner、普通潜鸟等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 恰帕斯州
nodes.summary: 恰帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括角冠雉、小灰頭稚冠雉、眼斑吐綬雞等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This flycatcher is endemic to the Pacific lowlands of Mexico's western coast from Sinaloa to western Chiapas, while possibly extending into Guatemala, although this has not been confirmed. The total area that it lives in is estimated to be . Its range is discontinuous and it is found in low densities when present. It lives in dry deciduous forest, arid and semi-arid thorn forest, and scrubby woodland at about above sea level. This species is non-migratory
